testcase.name: runScenario["Complete End to End Purchase Flow", "SauceDemo Complete End to End Flow"](1)
testcase.system-out:
================================================== SUITE STARTED: SauceDemo Web Functional Tests ================================================== >>> RUNNING TEST: runScenario
@e2e @smoke @regression @sanity Scenario: Complete End to End Purchase Flow &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/EndToEnd.feature:5&amp#27;[0m [BDD HOOK] Initializing browser for Scenario: Complete End to End Purchase Flow Setting up WebDriver for browser: chrome | Headless: false &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI read login data for &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"standard_user"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m from CSV&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.saucedemo.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.iReadLoginDataForFromCSV(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m Logging in with Username: [standard_user] | Password: [secret_sauce] &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI enter credentials and submit&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.saucedemo.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.iEnterCredentialsAndSubmit()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI should be navigated to the product dashboard&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.saucedemo.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.iShouldBeNavigatedToTheProductDashboard()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI add &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Sauce Labs Backpack"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m to the cart and navigate to checkout&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.saucedemo.stepdefinitions.CheckoutSteps.iAddProductToCartAndNavigateToCheckout(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m Loaded Checkout Form Data: [First: John | Last: Doe | Zip: 12345] &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI read checkout data for row index &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m0&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m from CSV&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.saucedemo.stepdefinitions.CheckoutSteps.iReadCheckoutDataForRowIndexFromCSV(int)&amp#27;[0m [INFO] Sent ESC key to close native dialog &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI fill step one checkout form and continue&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.saucedemo.stepdefinitions.CheckoutSteps.iFillStepOneCheckoutFormAndContinue()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI should be navigated to step two checkout overview page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.saucedemo.stepdefinitions.CheckoutSteps.iShouldBeNavigatedToStepTwoCheckoutOverviewPage()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI click finish&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.saucedemo.stepdefinitions.CheckoutSteps.iClickFinish()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI should be navigated to the order completion landing page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.saucedemo.stepdefinitions.CheckoutSteps.iShouldBeNavigatedToTheOrderCompletionLandingPage()&amp#27;[0m Actual Confirmation Header: Thank you for your order! &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe order confirmation success message should be displayed&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.saucedemo.stepdefinitions.CheckoutSteps.theOrderConfirmationSuccessMessageShouldBeDisplayed()&amp#27;[0m [BDD HOOK] Scenario completed: Complete End to End Purchase Flow | Status: PASSED Tearing down WebDriver... >>> TEST PASSED: runScenario
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details. May 24, 2026 9:10:47 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 148 May 24, 2026 9:10:47 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 148.0.7778.179. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.20.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Logout After Purchase Flow", "SauceDemo Complete End to End Flow"](2)

failure.message: FAILED: Expected to land on home.html after logout, but current URL is: https://www.saucedemo.com/ expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: FAILED: Expected to land on home.html after logout, but current URL is: https://www.saucedemo.com/ expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.saucedemo.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.theLogoutShouldNavigateToTheHomePage(LoginSteps.java:138) at ✽.the logout should navigate to the home page(file:///C:/Users/omkar.qualitrix/Saucedemo_SeleniumAutomation_AI/src/test/resources/features/EndToEnd.feature:30)
testcase.system-out:
>>> RUNNING TEST: runScenario

com.saucedemo.stepdefinitions.CheckoutSteps.theOrderConfirmationSuccessMessageShouldBeDisplayed()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI log out&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.saucedemo.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.iLogOut()&amp#27;[0m Current URL after logout: https://www.saucedemo.com/ &amp#27;[31mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[31mthe logout should navigate to the home
